channel.title: Online Dev Tools Blog
channel.description: Static-first dev/security workflow notes and tool deep-dives.

item.title: Building a Lightweight Incident-Response Toolbelt in the Browser: Repeatable Workflows
item.description: Learn how to build a browser-based incident response toolbelt with repeatable workflows using lightweight online dev tools for faster triage and resolution.

item.title: CSP Hardening Workflow: From Report-Only to Full Enforcement with Practical Testing
item.description: Learn how to harden Content Security Policy step by step—starting in report-only mode, analyzing violations, and enforcing safely with practical testing.

item.title: JSON Formatting for API Debugging: Predictable Diffs, Key Sorting, and Schema Checks
item.description: Learn how JSON formatting with key sorting and schema validation streamlines API debugging, produces predictable diffs, and speeds up code review.

item.title: WHOIS and Domain Intelligence: Investigating Ownership, Registrar Signals, and Response Workflows
item.description: Learn how WHOIS lookups reveal domain ownership, registrar data, and abuse signals. Build effective investigation and response workflows with domain intelligenc

item.title: Hashing vs HMAC for Engineers: Choosing Algorithms and Avoiding Common Mistakes
item.description: Learn when to use plain hashing vs HMAC, how to choose algorithms like SHA-256, and avoid critical security mistakes. Practical guide for engineers.

item.title: Regex Testing and Debugging in the Browser: Flags, Lookaheads, and Common Pitfalls
item.description: Master regex testing in the browser. Learn flags, lookaheads, lookbehinds, and common pitfalls with our interactive regex tester tool.
